TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-pear3_kalaeh a taro_

S.FORM: taboeen ray 'obos kaSra:i' 'askanen ray kala'.
S.TRANSL: 他放(水果)到袋子, 下來, 放進籃子裡。
He put (the fruits) in (his) bag, came down and placed (them) in the basket.

S.FORM: 'aehae' mariin boway ti:isin noka hahako'.
S.TRANSL: 他拿一個水果, 用包巾擦一擦。
He took one fruit and wiped it with a handkerchief.

S.FORM: insa'an kaSna'itol ray kaehoey babaw naehaen.
S.TRANSL: (老人)又再爬上樹。
(The old man) went up the tree again.

S.FORM: mwa:i' 'aehae' ka mae'iyaeh 'ima hoehoe' ka Siri' may hiza ilahiza kabih.
S.TRANSL: 拉著羊的男人經過那裡往那個方向去。
A man pulling a goat passed by there and went that way.

S.FORM: mwa:i' ka korkoring 'ima papama' ray kapapama'an mwa:i' ilahiza ray eh tatini' 'aehae' 'am rokrok ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 一個男孩騎著腳踏車來到老人摘水果的地方. 啊, 老人正在摘水果。
A boy came riding a bike and came to where the old man was picking fruits. Aah... An old man was picking fruits.

S.FORM: sisil ma pakalben ka kapapama'an sisil ka boway mariin 'in'alay ra:i' kapapama'an sikra:iw ila.
S.TRANSL: (男孩)放倒他的腳踏車, 提起一籃水果, 放到他的腳踏車, 然後離開。
(The boy) lay down his bike, lifted (the basket of) fruits, put (them) on his bike and left the old man.

S.FORM: ra:iw ila sia ray ra:an sasbong ka 'aehae' mae'iyaeh.
S.TRANSL: 他離開, 在路上遇見另一個男孩。
He left, and then met somebody along the way.

S.FORM: sia roSa' sasbong.
S.TRANSL: 他們兩個(在路上)相遇。
Both of them met (along the way).

S.FORM: tono' ka bato' malben.
S.TRANSL: (她的腳踏車)撞到石頭, (他就)跌倒。
(His bike) hit a stone and (he) fell down.

S.FORM: sisa:ah ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 水果散落(了滿地)。
The fruits spilled (all over the place).

S.FORM: mwa:i' to:o' mae'iyaeh korkoring tatilhaehael rokrok ka boway boway mariin papayhae'hae'en ray kala'.
S.TRANSL: 三個小孩過來幫忙(男孩)撿水果, 把它們放到籃子裡。
Three children came and helped (the boy) pick the fruits up and put them (back) in the basket.

S.FORM: 'in'alay ray kapapama'an 'arasen pama'en ila rima' ziza.
S.TRANSL: (男孩)提起(籃子)放回他的腳踏車, 然後騎走了。
(The boy) lifted (the basket) back to (his) bike and rode away taking (with him the basket).

S.FORM: eh rawaS ila sowiti' 'ima tatilhaehael to:o' mae'iyaeh korkoring sanabih hiyop koSa: niSo ka tatpo' singowip.
S.TRANSL: 當男孩走遠了一些, 三個男孩幫忙(撿起他的帽子), 回頭對著他吹(口哨), 說, 你忘了這帽子。
When the boy have gone a bit far, the three children helped (him pick his hat up), turned back and whistled at him saying, "you forgot this hat".

S.FORM: lobih hibih 'ae'ae:aew rima' minobih.
S.TRANSL: (男孩)轉回頭, (其中一個小孩)跑過去(把他的帽子)還給他。
(The boy) turned back and (one of the children) ran and returned (his hat).

S.FORM: insa'an be:ayen ka lapowar to:o' ba sibe:ay hilasia.
S.TRANSL: 現在(他)拿了三個芭樂給他們。
Now (he took) three guavas (and) gave to them.

S.FORM: 'am papnae'hae' 'aehae' 'apolon.
S.TRANSL: 每個小孩都給一個芭樂。
To distribute to wach (of them).

S.FORM: isaza tatini' rima' rokrok naehaen babaw ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 老人還在樹上摘水果。
The old man was still up in the tree to pick fruits.

S.FORM: kasra:i' mwa:i' ki:im.
S.TRANSL: (他)爬下來找(籃子)。
(He) climbed down and looked for (the basket).

S.FORM: Sa: hini boway 'ima hayno' ila.
S.TRANSL: 水果哪裡去了。
Where have the fruits here gone?

S.FORM: sakosizaen kitaen korkoring may isaza to:o' sahpi:ih ilahiza ila kabih naehaen manra:an.
S.TRANSL: (他)看到三個小孩經過, 往那個方向走下去。
(He) saw three children pass by and walk toward that direction.

S.FORM: oh.
S.TRANSL: DM
DM
